entry.title: Resume
entry.content:
Education

University of Information Technology ‑ Vietnam National University Ho Chi Minh City, VN

BSc in Information Technology, GPA: 3.34/4 ‑ 8.35/10 (2023 ‑ Present)

  • Studying in Japanese - Vietnamese

Skills

PL: C++, python, javascript, typescript.Techs/tools: Git, MS Office, SQL, MS Access, React, NodeJS, Next.js, Ubuntu, Vite, Vercel, PostgreSQL, Figma.

entry.title: Hello World
entry.content:
About me!

My name is Minh Duc.

You can pronounce it as “Min” and “Duc” - where “Duc” sounds like “Duke” but shorter. The name “Duc” carries profound meanings in Vietnamese culture, representing virtues like morality, talent, and leadership qualities, which I strive to embody in both my personal and professional life.

I am currently a third-year Information Technology student at the University of Information Technology (UIT), Vietnam National University Ho Chi Minh City. As I progress through my academic journey, I’m building a strong foundation in computer science fundamentals while exploring cutting-edge technologies that shape our digital future.

Besides, I love learning Math, code, computer, games, League of Legends, manga, swimming, gym.

About this blog

This blog will share my journey and the lessons I learn along the way.
